programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.desc: A five-year-old boy who lives with his parents and his sister embarks on mischievous adventures that often lead to hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Zordaar's Chacha annoys everyone when he visits his home. Later, the friends decide to teach him a lesson after he eats all of their food.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is forced by Misae to consume rice cakes on a daily basis. As a result, Shin-chan proceeds to hide the container of rice cakes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After purchasing a new car, Hiroshi and his family pay a visit to a bear farm. However, Shin-chan requests the instructor to feed him bear food.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae's pregnancy causes her to feel nauseated by the smell of food. As a result, she tries to keep away from food to keep herself from vomitting.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After feeling ignored by others, Shin-chan and Shiro leave the house. However, they are brought home by Hiroshi and Misae shares her concerns.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae is requested by Hiroshi to deliver some important documents to his place of work. However, Shin-chan forcefully accompanies her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When a cockroach infests the house, Misae asks Shin-chan to help her be rid of it. However, misadventures ensue and the cockroach remains.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After helping his mother Misae with a myriad of household chores, Shin-chan draws on her face with permanent ink when she falls asleep.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae is followed by Shin-chan when she is on her way to the bank. Once there, Shin-chan annoys her and keeps her from withdrawing any cash.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae wishes to knit a new sweater for Hiroshi and takes one of his old ones apart. However, with the wool, she ends up knitting a sweater for Shiro.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When the progressively worsening weather forces Misae and Shin-chan to remain indoors, they wait until Hiroshi returns from work and then fall asleep together.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is staying at Yoshinaga's house, he snoops around to find something different. However, Yoshinaga catches him in the act.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan watches a horror movie before his bedtime, he ends up getting frightened and sleeps with Hiroshi.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan visits a retirement home, he meets a politician. However, Shin-chan ends up asking him embarrassing questions.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a school trip, Shin-chan acts mischievously and pesters Yoshinaga. Later, Shin-chan drops Kazama's handkerchief when they visit the washroom.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a soccer match, Kawamura faces Shin-chan and his friends. However, he underestimates their skills and ends up losing to them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training, he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Matsuzaka is out on a date with her boyfriend when Shin-chan turns up and interrupts them. As a result, Matsuzaka takes him home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi surprises Shin-chan by purchasing a carp banner for him. Later, Shin-chan borrows a can to play with his friends.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan tries to offer his assistance to Misae in preparing their meals for dinner. However, his participation complicates the situation.

programme.title: Shin chan & The Mystery of Tenkasu Academy
programme.desc: When Shin-chan and his friends visit Tenkasu Academy, Kazama is attacked, and his intelligence is reduced. His friends join hands with a dropout student from the school to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae wishes to knit a new sweater for Hiroshi and takes one of his old ones apart. However, with the wool, she ends up knitting a sweater for Shiro.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan demands that his mother blow balloons and play with him and does not give her any reprieve, Misae obliges.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is searching for a garbage van but whilst doing so, he ends up destroying the garbage bag and makes a big mess.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae has ordered a pizza but Shin-chan drops it and refrains from telling her. However, later when Misae eats it, she realises what happened.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan barges into the room of a college student to take shelter, she tries to evict him but incurs challenges along the way.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits the department store with his mother. However, once there, he wanders around and realises that he is lost.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his mother visit the station and await the arrival of the train. Later, Shin-chan forces Misae to take him to a washroom.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans on preparing a meal for Hiroshi's client but she forgets a few ingredients. As a result, she instructs Shin-chan to fetch them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When it begins to rain torrentially, Misae quickly moves the clothes to the first floor but forgets to close a tap which leads to flooding.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae tries a new approach to deal with Shin-chan and correct his behaviour by appreciating his mischief instead of berating him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to make repairs on the broken pipe, Hiroshi climbs on to the roof. However, Shin-chan's incessant mischief causes him to lose his balance.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: On a hot summer day, Shin-chan pesters Misae to purchase an ice crusher for him. However, he eats too much of it and suffers a stomachache.

programme.title: Shin chan - Dangerous Family Holiday
programme.desc: Mitsy surprises the Nohara family with a trip to Australia. Upon their arrival, Harry gets abducted, leaving the others to rescue him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Despite her initial apprehensions, Misae gifts a tricycle to Shin-chan. However, his tricycle falls into a dirty lake by accident.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. Together, they seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to solve various criminal cases.

programme.title: Gutur Gu
programme.desc: An eccentric family faces hilarious situations because of their individual quirks. Together, they try to overcome the misunderstandings and the confusing situations.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: A humble spiritual figure transforms lives in a small village by spreading compassion, unity and wisdom while confronting social divisions and injustice with calm resolve.

programme.title: Partners Trouble Ho Gayi Double
programme.desc: Cops Aditya and Manav clash constantly due to difference of opinions, yet do not shy away when mysterious crimes and bizzare investigations require getting along with each other.

programme.title: Partners Trouble Ho Gayi Double
programme.desc: Cops Aditya and Manav clash constantly due to difference of opinions, yet do not shy away when mysterious crimes and bizzare investigations require getting along with each other.

programme.title: Sankatmochan Mahabali Hanuman
programme.desc: Lord Hanuman, a divine being and a devout follower of Lord Rama, is the destroyer of obstacles and helps Lord Rama defeat Ravana.

programme.desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. Together, they seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to solve various criminal cases.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul informs the residents of Gokuldham that after visiting the headquarters of the milk company, he gave some packets of milk delivered by Santosh to Iyer for testing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham have Santosh and his men arrested. Iyer teaches everyone how to distinguish between real and synthetic milk.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Popatlal get into an argument over something silly, prompting Taarak Mehta to come solve their problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham tries to find Pom Pom to recruit her to the society. Eventually, they decide to use a set of different cats for one purpose.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: During his morning walk, Champaklal's friends propose a potential match for Tapu. Raja Mastana calls Tapu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Joshi Kaka visits Bhide with a marriage proposal for Sonu, surprising him and everyone else. How will Bhide respond?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide discovers that Tapu and Sonu have tricked him and Champaklal. Later, he takes Raja Mastana's number from Abdul and plans to teach Raja Mastana a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi and Bhide prepare elaborately to meet Raja Mastana. Tapu and Sonu face unexpected consequences of this meeting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide invites Raja Mastana to Gokuldham and reveals to Champaklal that he has a surprise for the guest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu learn that Bhide has invited Raja Mastana to the Gokuldham society. Bhide surprises Champaklal with an announcement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Disappointed with Sonu for her decision, Bhide and Madhavi lash out at her. Sonu becomes frustrated and calls Tapu to come help her out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu rejects all the matches that Joshi Kaka brings for her. Kanji Kaka presents Tapu with a few potential matches.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Madhavi and Sonu head to the parlour, the Mahila Mandal members rush to catch them. Bhide informs Champaklal that the groom's family are coming.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu feels emotional about leaving the society after her marriage. Later, she and Tapu meet and express their sadness together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu has a dream where the family of the groom chosen for her approves of her. In a panic, she calls Tapu for help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu tells Sonu that they should run away from their families and marry each other. In order to set his plan into motion, he enlists the help of his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu's friends prepare to carry out his plan, but they run into some obstacles. When Sonu tries to leave her house, Bhide stands guard and blocks her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu consoles Sonu when she feels bad for deceiving her father. Bhide tells Jethalal that Tapu and Sonu have gone missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone tries to search for Tapu and his friends, but they are nowhere to be found. Tapu and Sonu prepare for their marriage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members search for Tapu and Sonu, while Tapu comforts Sonu, assuring her about their decision.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide goes to the police station to file a complaint against Tapu. The other members of Gokuldham society are invited home by Tapu and Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Mahila Mandal stop Jethalal and Bhide from entering Gokuldham. Tapu and Sonu call everyone and reveal the truth behind everything.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu confess that they are not married to each other and explain the real reason as to why they decided to run away from Gokuldham.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Suhas is visited by Hetal in Igatpuri, while Sara and Anvita share a breakfast. The true intentions behind Sara's presence remain a mystery during this surprise encounter.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Virat's prized garage incinerates, leaving him devastated. However, he remains unaware of Sara's secret role in the catastrophic arson.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma encounters a jeweller who complains about a thief. Soon, she takes the case back to the station to begin her investigation.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena lands in a trap when her unusual plan backfires. Later, DSP Anubhav confronts Haseena about her methods.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone loses hope because of the heavy rains. However, Dr Hathi suddenly arrives with a statue and tells the society members how a small boy helped him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Society members thank Dr. Hathi for bringing Ganesh Ji's idol on the auspicious day of Ganesh Chaturthi.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma encounters a jeweller who complains about a thief. Soon, she takes the case back to the station to begin her investigation.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena lands in a trap when her unusual plan backfires. Later, DSP Anubhav confronts Haseena about her methods.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide tells the residents of Gokuldham that All-in-one bhai is stopping him from staging the garba festival. Daya gets worried and calls Jethalal to solve the issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All-in-one bhai repeats his threats to cancel Gokuldham's garba festival. The residents then hear that Jethalal sold a set of speakers to him.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone loses hope because of the heavy rains. However, Dr Hathi suddenly arrives with a statue and tells the society members how a small boy helped him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Society members thank Dr. Hathi for bringing Ganesh Ji's idol on the auspicious day of Ganesh Chaturthi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: What has Tappu Sena planned for the event? This is a question that's on Bhide's mind and he wants an answer as soon as possible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the announcement of various competitions during the celebration night, everyone in Gokuldham Society is gearing up for the contests.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.desc: Some of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcase people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: The parents agree to send their children for work at the factory from the following day. In the meantime, Sai tries his best to convince the parents otherwise.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai asks the elders in the city to use the things that belong to their children. In the meantime, Sai mentions the reason behind his outrageous request.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Prasad informs the parents about the contract which they are supposed to sign. On the other hand, Sai tries to convince the parents not to send their children to work.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Kulkarni lashes out at his accomplice when he fails to get the job done. On the other hand, Sai refuses to accept the gift from the children's parents.

programme.desc: Highlights and analysis of memorable moments and key plays executed by Europe's top football clubs at the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Round 6: Madrid E-Prix; FIA Formula E Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the FIA Formula E World Championship, where drivers compete against each other in electric open-wheel single-seater cars.

programme.title: 2010: India vs. Pakistan; Asia Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2010 match between India and Pakistan in the Asia Cup, where the two professional cricket teams compete against each other for victory.

programme.title: 2nd Test: England vs India; Test Cricket
programme.desc: Professional cricket teams from around the world compete against each other to emerge victorious in various Test matches.

programme.title: Twenty20 Cricket
programme.desc: England competes against India in their second T20 International match, where the two professional cricket teams vie for victory.

programme.title: England vs. India, 2nd ODI; Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: India and England compete against each other in the second ODI match.

programme.desc: Highlights of the FIA Formula E World Championship, where drivers compete against each other in electric open-wheel single-seater cars.

programme.title: 2024: 1st T20I, Sri Lanka vs India; Twenty20 Cricket
programme.desc: Sri Lanka competes against India in their first T20 International match in 2024, where the two professional cricket teams vie for victory.

programme.title: Bharat Tum Chale Chalo - Kahani 2021-22 Ki
programme.desc: Relive the thrilling 2021-22 Test series in England as India's grit, strategy and iconic moments unfold through voices from inside and around the dressing room.
